description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe. Fragment (lower right corner). Concerning a divorce. Mentions something (the bill of divorce? the ketubba payment?) given to Elʿazar (her agent?). Dated 1127-1138, based on Ḥalfon's active dates and the reshut clause under the authority of Masliah Gaon.
tags: Halfon b. Menashshe, Masliah Gaon, divorce
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
